name: Guildheart Hub
summary: The central meeting and arbitration node of the Union successor order.
day_to_day: Hosts negotiations, sanctions, contract reviews, and guild coordination.
who_works_there: Arbiters, delegates, clerks, sanction officers, merchant advocates.
who_uses_it: Guilds, merchants, caravan leaders, debt claimants, disputing houses.
authority: Can mediate and sanction market actors under Union authority.
public_manifestation: Constant dealmaking, posted rulings, crowding during summit periods, and reputational rumor.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Speed and fairness are constantly in tension when too many interests converge.
